rationale: Review 2's three findings are real (confirmed by direct inspection of the Quadratic.lean inv_mem' case at the hD/hden block showing duplicated unused `hb0` + `show (1+1)=2` patch, and the SquareClass.lean calc at prod_map using `rw [Finset.prod_map]; rfl`), material to proof-quality (brittleness/duplication harms maintainability in mathlib-style code), and would produce a meaningfully better merged PR if addressed; Review 1's blanket approval misses them.
